nasb.text: I even paid close attention to you; Indeed, there was no one who refuted Job, Not one of you who answered his words.

esv.text: I gave you my attention, and, behold, there was none among you who refuted Job or who answered his words.

cnv.text: 我留意聽你們， 不料，你們中間沒有人能駁倒約伯， 駁回他所說的話。

ccb.text: 我仔细聆听， 发现你们无人能驳倒约伯， 无人能答复他。
